# allocationThreshold

**Instance Property**

A new pixel buffer will not be allocated if the pool already has this many or more pixel buffers allocated. This does not prevent already-allocated buffers from being recycled. If this causes allocation failure, then `CVMutablePixelBuffer/Pool/mutablePixelBuffer(allocationThreshold:)` throws [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVError/wouldExceedAllocationThreshold].

## Declaration

```swift
var allocationThreshold: Int?
```
title: allocationThreshold
